# Writing Page Pattern

Model this page on the reference site's writing archive: a searchable, compact index with optional grouping.

Purpose:

- present writing as a first-class body of work
- make entries easy to scan and filter

Reference structure:

- page title and short framing description
- search input
- optional category tabs such as work vs life
- compact table
- columns centered on title, category, and date
- truncated description under the title when available

Good dynamic behaviors:

- search
- category tabs
- row click-through to entry detail pages
- empty state when no entries match

Keep it profile-agnostic:

- use categories only if the content naturally supports them
- do not assume any specific writing themes or tone
- if volume is low, a single clean list is enough
